SEARCH
パッケージ org.unlaxer.infra.syslenz4j

クラス SyslenzAgent

java.lang.Object
org.unlaxer.infra.syslenz4j.SyslenzAgent
public final class SyslenzAgent extends Object
Main entry point for the syslenz Java integration.

Embed this in any Java application to export JVM and custom metrics to syslenz. Two modes of operation are supported:

  • Server mode — starts a TCP server that responds to SNAPSHOT requests (compatible with syslenz --connect).
  • Stdout mode — prints a single ProcEntry JSON snapshot to stdout (compatible with the syslenz plugin protocol).

Quick start (server mode)


 // In your application's main():
 SyslenzAgent.startServer(9100);

 // Then from terminal:
 // syslenz --connect localhost:9100

Quick start (plugin / stdout mode)


 SyslenzAgent.printSnapshot();

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static void
    printSnapshot()
    Print a single metric snapshot to stdout in ProcEntry JSON format and return.
    static MetricRegistry
    registry()
    Return the shared MetricRegistry for registering custom application metrics.
    static void
    startServer(int port)
    Start a TCP server that serves metric snapshots on the given port.
    static void
    stopServer()
    Stop the TCP server if one is running.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • メソッドの詳細

    • startServer

      public static void startServer(int port)
      Start a TCP server that serves metric snapshots on the given port.

      The server runs on a daemon thread and will not prevent the JVM from shutting down. It responds to the SNAPSHOT\n command with a ProcEntry JSON payload followed by a newline.

      Calling this method multiple times is safe; subsequent calls are ignored if a server is already running.

      パラメータ:
      port - TCP port to listen on (e.g. 9100)

    • printSnapshot

      public static void printSnapshot()
      Print a single metric snapshot to stdout in ProcEntry JSON format and return. Suitable for use as a syslenz plugin.

    • registry

      public static MetricRegistry registry()
      Return the shared MetricRegistry for registering custom application metrics. 
      
 SyslenzAgent.registry().gauge("queue_size", () -> myQueue.size());
 SyslenzAgent.registry().counter("requests_total", requestCounter::get);
      戻り値:
      the global metric registry

    • stopServer

      public static void stopServer()
      Stop the TCP server if one is running. Mostly useful for testing.
